HIGH_ERA_SUFFIX_ERA_MISMATCH.root_cause: LORE/STORY templates referenced specific historical era (Bình Ngô đại cáo / Cổ Loa / Quang Trung) but were picked independent of speaker era — dialog.era (= speaker.era) contradicted template content era
HIGH_ERA_SUFFIX_ERA_MISMATCH.fix: refactored LORE_TEMPLATES + STORY_TEMPLATES from list[str] to list[(era_tag|None, text)]. gen_dialog_line now filters template pool by era (era-agnostic templates with tag=None match ANY era as fallback). Added _audit_era_pool_coverage() at module load — aborts exit 3 if any era has 0 matching templates.
HIGH_ERA_SUFFIX_ERA_MISMATCH.templates_added: 9 LORE (3 Nguyễn / 2 Lê / 2 Tây Sơn / 2 f5) + 6 STORY (2 G1 / 1 f1 / 1 f2 / 1 f3 / 1 f5) + 8 era-agnostic LORE to ensure fallback pool depth

MED_DTYPE_ERA_COVERAGE_GAP.root_cause: story speaker pool filter (is_protagonist | is_historical_figure | mentor) yields only 58 NPCs from 10000, missing nguyen + f3 entirely
MED_DTYPE_ERA_COVERAGE_GAP.fix: expanded story pool predicate to include npc_type='lore_npc' OR can_train_skill OR tier>0. Pool 58 -> 8349 covering all 11 eras. story now distributes: f1=769 / g1=524 / tay_son=288 / tran=271 / le=261 / ly=180 / nguyen=138 / f2=81 / f3=42 / f5=25 / f4=21

LOW_TEXT_THIN_BODY_FALSE_POSITIVE.details: combat barks 'Sát!' / 'Chiến!' / 'Chém!' canonical short Vietnamese shouts
LOW_TEXT_THIN_BODY_FALSE_POSITIVE.fix: deep_audit lens 30 now exempts combat type from body-length check (intentional design)
